help_page.title: Help Center

quick_start.title: Register/Login
quick_start.description: Create an account or login to track your progress.

quick_start.title: Choose a Quiz
quick_start.description: Select from available practice tests on the home page.

quick_start.title: Take the Quiz
quick_start.description: Answer questions within the time limit.

quick_start.title: Review Results
quick_start.description: See your score and review correct answers.

faqs.question: What is the passing score?
faqs.answer: You need to score at least 80% (32 out of 40 questions) to pass.

faqs.question: How long is the test?
faqs.answer: The test consists of 40 questions: 10 traffic sign questions and 30 rules and regulations questions.

faqs.question: Can I retake the test?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can retake the test as many times as you need.

faqs.question: Are the questions random?
faqs.answer: Yes, questions are randomly selected from our database to simulate the actual DMV test.

faqs.question: How do I study for the test?
faqs.answer: Review the Minnesota Driver's Manual and take our practice tests regularly.

study_tips: Review incorrect answers after each quiz
